description: A prospective student and their family want to schedule a campus tour.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user to the admissions website's tour scheduling page.
Explain the different tour options available (e.g., general campus tour, engineering department tour).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the available choices.

nodes.task_description: Assist the user in selecting a date and time and completing the registration form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent helps the family successfully book their tour.
